::: {style="background-color: #f8f9fa; padding: 1rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;"}
**Navigate to another tree:**

::: {style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; max-width: 300px;"}
<input type="number" id="treeNumber" min="1" placeholder="Tree number" style="flex: 1; padding: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.9rem;">
<button type="button" onclick="window.location.href = document.getElementById('treeNumber').value + '.html'" style="background-color: #007bff; color: white; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.9rem; white-space: nowrap;">
Go
</button>
:::

[← Back to Tree Database](index.html)
:::
